source.title: Fixed Golden career evidence
source.content: Microsoft platform delivery, enterprise automation, technical enablement, workshops, analytics, AI governance, cloud integration, documentation, stakeholder discovery, and adoption measurement.

experience.role: Microsoft Platform and AI Operations Lead
experience.scope: Enterprise Microsoft platform delivery and enablement.

evidence.title: Technical enablement
evidence.proof: Delivered structured technical onboarding and knowledge transfer.

evidence.title: Workshops
evidence.proof: Facilitated Microsoft platform workshops for enterprise stakeholders.

evidence.title: Learning and adoption analytics
evidence.proof: Built KPI and feedback reporting for adoption programs.

evidence.title: Power Platform delivery
evidence.proof: Designed and delivered Power Apps and Power Automate solutions.

evidence.title: Copilot and Fabric adoption
evidence.proof: Implemented Copilot Studio and Fabric adoption workflows.

evidence.title: AI governance
evidence.proof: Implemented privacy, risk, and responsible AI controls.

evidence.title: Enterprise automation
evidence.proof: Built tested enterprise workflow automation and operational monitoring.

scenarios.raw_jd_text: IT Technical Trainer delivering datacenter curriculum, workshops, onboarding, learning analytics, and technical knowledge transfer. Preferred certifications include CTT+, ITIL, CCNA, MCSE and NET+. Fully on-site.

normalized_jd.overview: Deliver technical enablement and datacenter curriculum.
normalized_jd.core_content: technical workshops onboarding learning analytics datacenter curriculum

expected_transferable_matches: internal enterprise workshop to technical training delivery
expected_formal_risks: CTT+, ITIL, CCNA, MCSE, NET+ and fully on-site
scenarios.expected_application_recommendation: Apply with a truthful technical-enablement transfer CV.

analysis.summaryAngle: Technical enablement and enterprise technology training

positioning.safestPositioning: Position as a technical enablement and enterprise technology trainer, not a datacenter operator.
interviewRiskQuestions: How much direct datacenter experience do you have?

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Enterprise technical enablement
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Direct enterprise technical enablement evidence.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Transfer enterprise workshops into structured training
jdEvidenceMapping.transferContext: internal enterprise workshop to technical training delivery
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Workshop facilitation transfers credibly without claiming formal trainer history.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Adoption and learning KPI reporting
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Direct adoption analytics evidence.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Transfer process documentation to curriculum support
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Documentation capability transfers; datacenter subject matter requires ramp-up.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Present as a bounded ramp-up area, not current expertise
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: The domain curriculum is learnable because adjacent enablement capability is evidenced, but current mastery is not.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: CTT+, ITIL, CCNA, MCSE, NET+ and fully on-site
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Disclose credentials and work-site fit truthfully
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Certifications absent and on-site preference risk
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Formal screening risk, not capability proof.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not claim datacenter operations
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Direct datacenter operations are not supported and are a core gap.

recorded_writer_claims.text: Delivered structured Microsoft technical enablement and knowledge transfer.
Facilitated enterprise platform workshops with conservative transfer positioning.
Built adoption KPI reporting for enablement programs.

scenarios.raw_jd_text: Senior Software Engineer for CoreAI. Requires professional C# or Python backend engineering, algorithms, distributed systems, high-performance services, observability, deployment ownership, live-site and on-call leadership.

normalized_jd.overview: Build and operate distributed AI platform services.
normalized_jd.core_content: backend distributed services algorithms observability live site

forbidden_claims: six or more years of professional software engineering
scenarios.expected_application_recommendation: Do not prioritize generation; target adjacent AI solution or operations roles.

analysis.summaryAngle: AI governance and automation overlap only

positioning.safestPositioning: Do not position as a senior backend engineer.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: AI governance exposure
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Relevant overlap but not core software engineering.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: professional C# or Python backend engineering
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not claim backend engineering depth
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Core daily capability is unsupported.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not equate workflow architecture with distributed systems
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Enterprise workflow architecture is not distributed software architecture.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not claim live-site ownership
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Operational workflow support is not software-service on-call ownership.

recorded_writer_claims.text: Implemented responsible AI governance controls for enterprise workflows.
Reported operational adoption trends without claiming service observability.

scenarios.raw_jd_text: Power Platform and Copilot Solution Engineer covering Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI, Fabric, Copilot Studio, customer discovery, demonstrations, workshops, adoption, governance and five years of technical presales.

normalized_jd.overview: Design and demonstrate Microsoft business solutions.
normalized_jd.core_content: power platform copilot solution discovery workshops adoption governance

expected_transferable_matches: internal discovery to external customer discovery
expected_formal_risks: five years of formal technical presales
forbidden_claims: five years of formal technical presales
regularly sold to CIOs or CFOs
scenarios.expected_application_recommendation: Prioritize application with Microsoft platform and AI solution engineer positioning.

analysis.primaryTargetTitle: Microsoft Platform and AI Solution Engineer
analysis.summaryAngle: Microsoft platform solution delivery and AI governance

positioning.safestPositioning: Microsoft platform and AI solution engineer, not quota-carrying sales executive.
positioning.headlineRecommendation: Microsoft Platform and AI Solution Engineer
interviewRiskQuestions: How much formal presales ownership do you have?

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Power Platform solution delivery
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Direct platform-delivery evidence.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Copilot, Fabric and governed AI adoption
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Direct Microsoft AI adoption evidence.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Transfer enterprise stakeholder discovery
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: Direct external presales evidence is limited
jdEvidenceMapping.transferContext: internal discovery to external customer discovery
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Discovery method transfers; customer context must remain explicit.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Transfer internal solution workshops
jdEvidenceMapping.gapOrRisk: No repeated external CxO selling evidence
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Workshop capability transfers conservatively.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: five years of formal technical presales
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not fabricate years or title
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Years are a screening risk, not capability fit.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Position solution delivery, not revenue ownership
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Solution delivery overlaps, but commercial ownership is unsupported.

recorded_writer_claims.text: Designed and delivered evidence-backed Power Platform solutions.
Implemented Copilot and Fabric adoption with responsible AI controls.
Facilitated enterprise solution workshops while preserving the internal stakeholder context.

scenarios.raw_jd_text: Experimentation Platform Software Engineer, job 200041630. Build distributed backend services, experimentation infrastructure, A/B testing, observability, reliable deployment, production debugging, live-site and on-call operations using C++, C#, Java or Python.

normalized_jd.core_content: distributed backend experimentation observability reliability on call

forbidden_claims: participated in software engineering on-call rotations
scenarios.expected_application_recommendation: Do not prioritize; use adjacent-role transition guidance.

analysis.summaryAngle: Enterprise automation and AI operations overlap only

positioning.safestPositioning: Enterprise automation, data, and AI operations; not experimentation-platform engineering.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: responsible AI, automation and Azure familiarity
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Responsible AI and enterprise automation overlap
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Credible overlap does not establish core platform engineering.

jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not claim backend service ownership
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: Enterprise automation is not distributed backend engineering.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: large-scale experimentation and A/B testing platform
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not claim experimentation platform work
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: KPI analytics is not experimentation-platform engineering.

jdEvidenceMapping.requirement: service reliability, observability, live-site and on-call
jdEvidenceMapping.safeCvAngle: Do not equate flow monitoring with service observability
jdEvidenceMapping.explanation: BI and workflow monitoring are not service observability or on-call ownership.

recorded_writer_claims.text: Implemented responsible AI controls for enterprise workflows.
Built tested enterprise automation and operational reporting.
Measured adoption KPIs without claiming statistical experimentation ownership.
